nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=85 beats='{HERO} and his grown-up {CHAPERONE} step through {ENTRANCE} just as the lantern strings blink on overhead; warm steam drifts from the food stalls, paper crinkles at the craft tables, and somewhere a fiddle tunes up; tonight ends with {GOAL}, the part {HERO} loves best; near {ENTRANCE} something small is sniffling behind a barrel; warm and twinkly, never spooky'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=78 beats='behind the barrel is a small {COMPANION_KIND} curled almost into a ball, shy and small; her name is {COMPANION} and she is new to {THRESHOLD} and very shy; between sniffles she explains that she lost her little basket with the three things she needs for the closing {GOAL}, {ITEM1}, {ITEM2}, and {ITEM3}; {HERO} kneels down slowly and gently'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=70 beats='{HERO} promises they will sort it out together, and {CHAPERONE} nods; the stall keepers of {THRESHOLD} are the kindest anywhere, she says, and helping hands are always welcome here; a small kindness at a stall is worth more than coins; {COMPANION} uncurls a little and takes {HERO} by the hand; together the three of them walk into {HUB}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='{HUB} is the round heart of {THRESHOLD}, criss-crossed with strings of paper lanterns; lanes lead off to {ROUTE_A_STALL} wrapped in {ROUTE_A_LURE}, {ROUTE_B_STALL} with his {ROUTE_B_LURE}, {ROUTE_C_STALL} with its {ROUTE_C_LURE}, {ROUTE_D_STALL} bent over {ROUTE_D_LURE}, {ROUTE_E_STALL} stacked with {ROUTE_E_LURE}, and {ROUTE_F_STALL} where {ROUTE_F_LURE}; at the head of the square {GOAL_STEPS} glow, ready whenever they are; keep this scene general so it reads naturally on a first arrival or on any return trip between stalls; {COMPANION} stays close while {HERO} picks where to go'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='at {ROUTE_A_STALL} {ROUTE_A_KEEPER} is a one-woman whirlwind, bamboo steamers puffing, orders calling, a wobbling tower of trays waiting to go out to the little tables; she spots {HERO} and {COMPANION} through the steam and laughs that she could use four more hands tonight; {HERO} decides whether to carry the warm trays out to the tables or to join the folding table and help pleat {ROUTE_A_GOOD}'>>

choices.label: Carry the warm trays to the tables.
Join the folding table and pleat {ROUTE_A_GOOD}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='the trays are warm as sunbaked stones and smell of {ROUTE_A_GOOD} spice; lantern-lit tables of hungry customers wave from every side; {COMPANION} trots alongside holding the napkins; {HERO} decides whether to take one tray at a time, slow and steady like a waiter in a fancy restaurant, or to stack three trays high and deliver everything in one heroic trip'>>

choices.label: Take one tray at a time, slow and steady.
Stack three trays high for one big trip.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=62 beats='tray by careful tray, every table gets its {ROUTE_A_GOOD} hot and perfect; customers cheer for the small waiter and his {COMPANION_KIND} napkin helper; {ROUTE_A_KEEPER} watches from the steam and beams like a lantern herself; when the last tray lands she waves {HERO} and {COMPANION} back to {ROUTE_A_STALL} for a thank-you'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='at the folding table {ROUTE_A_KEEPER} shows {HERO} the pleat, pinch and fold, pinch and fold, like tucking a tiny blanket; {HERO}'s first {ROUTE_A_GOOD} is wonky and his second is wonkier, but the tenth stands up almost proud; {COMPANION} pats the dough flat with careful paws; {ROUTE_A_KEEPER} steams the whole wobbly batch anyway and calls them the night specials'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{ROUTE_A_KEEPER} tucks two warm {ROUTE_A_GOOD} into a paper bag and presses it into {COMPANION}'s paws, saying shy tummies are much braver when they are warm; she promises to close her steamers in time for {GOAL} and to cheer for {COMPANION}'s lantern extra loud; {COMPANION} hugs the warm bag; {HERO} can head back to {HUB} or take {COMPANION} on toward {GOAL_STEPS}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='{ROUTE_B_STALL} is strung with {ROUTE_B_GOOD} that turn slowly in the warm lantern air; {ROUTE_B_KEEPER} looks up in dismay, his basket of colored paper has tipped and squares of red and gold and blue are drifting across the lane like slow butterflies; {HERO} decides whether to chase and gather the drifting paper squares or to help sort the crane papers back into their color trays'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} tiptoe after the paper squares, catching them gently so they do not crumple, off a bench, off a lantern pole, out of a sleepy dog's fur; soon only one runaway square is left, a gold one, resting high on the noodle cart's awning; {HERO} decides whether to ask the tall noodle cook for a boost or to wait for the breeze to bring it down'>>

choices.label: Ask the tall noodle cook for a boost.
Wait for the breeze to bring it down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='the noodle cook laughs, lifts {HERO} onto his shoulders like a sack of noodles, and {HERO} plucks the gold square safe and smooth; from up high all of {THRESHOLD} glitters; back on the ground {COMPANION} carries the rescued square to {ROUTE_B_KEEPER} like a tiny flag'>>

choices.label: Bring the rescued papers back to {ROUTE_B_KEEPER}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} stand very still, palms up, and wait; the breeze thinks about it, then tips the gold square off the awning and floats it down in lazy zigzags right into {COMPANION}'s open paws; {COMPANION} squeaks with delight, the first happy squeak of the night'>>

choices.label: Carry the gold square back to {ROUTE_B_KEEPER}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='{HERO} sorts the squares into their trays, reds with reds, golds with golds, blues with blues, while {ROUTE_B_KEEPER} smooths each one flat with his thumb; as they work he folds a scrap into a crane right before their eyes, corner to corner, until it flaps; {COMPANION} watches so closely her nose nearly touches the paper'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{ROUTE_B_KEEPER} thanks them, then cuts a fresh square of moon-white paper, creases it once into the special wish fold, and gives it to {COMPANION}, {ITEM1} just like the one she lost; he promises to sit near the front at {GOAL} to watch it fly; {COMPANION} holds it flat like treasure; {HERO} can head back to {HUB} or on toward {GOAL_STEPS}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='{ROUTE_C_STALL} glows with a tiny iron stove, and {ROUTE_C_KEEPER} pours amber {ROUTE_C_GOOD} in ribbons that steam in the night air; a line of thirsty stall keepers has formed and her kettle is running low all at once; she winks at {HERO} and {COMPANION} over her spectacles; {HERO} decides whether to help pass out the little clay cups or to help refill the big kettle from the water barrel'>>

choices.label: Pass out the little clay cups.
Refill the big kettle from the barrel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='the little clay cups are warm as held hands and full to their happy brims; the waiting stall keepers chat and stretch; {COMPANION} walks beside {HERO} announcing each cup in her small voice, which gets a tiny bit louder each time; {HERO} decides whether to carry two cups at a time, nice and level, or to load the whole tray up and serve everyone in one go'>>

choices.label: Carry two cups at a time, nice and level.
Load up the whole tray in one go.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=62 beats='two cups at a time, steady as a bridge, {HERO} delivers {ROUTE_C_GOOD} all down the line; keepers warm their hands and sigh happy sighs; {ROUTE_D_KEEPER} toasts him with a raised cup and {ROUTE_F_KEEPER} hums a thank-you note; {ROUTE_C_KEEPER} calls them back to the cart with a smile brewing'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='{HERO} ladles clear water from the barrel into the big kettle, one careful scoop after another, while {COMPANION} counts the scoops; {ROUTE_C_KEEPER} sets it on the tiny stove and shows them how she banks the coals so the fire stays cozy but calm all night; the kettle begins its low singing; she looks like she has an idea'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{ROUTE_C_KEEPER} lights a stubby candle from her stove and sets it inside a little tin with a hinged lid, a traveling flame for {COMPANION}'s lantern, just like {ITEM3} she lost; she tucks it into {COMPANION}'s paws and promises to bring her sweet {ROUTE_C_GOOD} to {GOAL_STEPS}; the tin is warm as a purring kitten; {HERO} can head back to {HUB} or on toward {GOAL_STEPS}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='{ROUTE_D_STALL} is a tiny hospital for {ROUTE_D_GOOD}, wind-up beetles, one-eared rabbits, a drum with a new skin; {ROUTE_D_KEEPER} peers through a lens the size of a teacup, hunting for a runaway brass gear while his tin of tiny screws sits in a jumble; {HERO} decides whether to sort the tin of tiny screws by size or to hunt for the runaway gear under the stall'>>

choices.label: Sort the tin of tiny screws by size.
Hunt for the runaway gear under the stall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='the screws are small as sesame seeds and every size is different; {HERO} spreads them on the green felt while {COMPANION} sorts with the tips of her claws, which turn out to be perfect tweezers; nearby a shiny wind-up beetle sits waiting, its key just begging for a turn; {HERO} decides whether to keep lining the screws up in neat rows or to wind the beetle's key as far as it can go'>>

choices.label: Keep lining the screws up in neat rows.
Wind the beetle's key as far as it can go.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='row by row the screws line up like a tiny parade, big to small; {ROUTE_D_KEEPER} looks up from his lens and blinks at the tidy felt as if elves had visited; now he can fix three {ROUTE_D_GOOD} in the time one used to take; he waves {HERO} and {COMPANION} closer, reaching for something on his shelf'>>

choices.label: Come see what {ROUTE_D_KEEPER} is reaching for.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='under the stall it is a shadow-land of table legs and wood shavings; {HERO} borrows a lantern and {COMPANION} squeezes into the narrow places, and there, winking in a floorboard crack, is the brass gear; {COMPANION} hooks it out with one careful claw; {ROUTE_D_KEEPER} cheers so loudly the one-eared rabbit falls over; he beckons them close, reaching for his shelf'>>

choices.label: Come see what {ROUTE_D_KEEPER} is reaching for.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{ROUTE_D_KEEPER} notices the little dent in {COMPANION}'s carrying lantern frame and taps it round again with three soft taps, then oils the tiny door until it swings like new; last of all he clips {ROUTE_D_CHARM} to the handle, a night-light friend for a shy walker; he promises to watch {GOAL} from his stool; {HERO} can head back to {HUB} or on toward {GOAL_STEPS}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='{ROUTE_E_STALL} is a city of bright pyramids, oranges, star fruit, plums with dusty purple cheeks; a passing cart has bumped the corner and {ROUTE_E_KEEPER}'s grandest orange pyramid has tumbled into a rolling puddle of oranges; she is laughing about it, but her hands are full weighing plums; {HERO} decides whether to rebuild the orange pyramid or to help tie {ROUTE_E_GOOD} bundles with her {ITEM2}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} herd the runaway oranges home, {COMPANION} rolling them in with her nose; now comes the fun engineering part; {HERO} decides whether to build it the classic way, biggest oranges on the bottom in a solid square, or to try a fancy pattern with stripes of orange and green star fruit'>>

choices.label: Build it the classic way, big ones on the bottom.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='big oranges on the bottom, smaller and smaller to the top, and the pyramid rises steady as a castle; {HERO} places the last orange like a crown and the whole stand seems to stand up straighter; {ROUTE_E_KEEPER} whistles, impressed, and dusts off her hands to find them a thank-you'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=62 beats='orange, green, orange, green, the stripes climb the pyramid like a lighthouse; a few customers stop just to look at it, and one takes a picture with a very long camera; {ROUTE_E_KEEPER} declares it the prettiest pyramid {THRESHOLD} has ever grown and waves {HERO} and {COMPANION} over with a twinkle'>>

choices.label: Go see what {ROUTE_E_KEEPER} is twinkling about.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='{ROUTE_E_KEEPER} teaches {HERO} the bundle knot, loop, loop, pull, and soon plums and star fruit sit in tidy golden-tied bundles ready for shoppers; {COMPANION} holds the string spool and lets it spin; loop, loop, pull, {COMPANION} whispers along, learning it too; the spool of {ITEM2} glints in the lantern light as {ROUTE_E_KEEPER} reaches for her scissors'>>

choices.label: Watch what {ROUTE_E_KEEPER} snips off the spool.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='{ROUTE_E_KEEPER} measures out a long {ITEM2} from her spool, just like the one {COMPANION} lost, and coils it into {COMPANION}'s paws along with one perfect star fruit for luck; she promises to bring a {ROUTE_E_GOOD} plate to {GOAL_STEPS} for after the lanterns fly; {COMPANION} practices the knot in the air, loop, loop, pull; {HERO} can head back to {HUB} or on toward {GOAL_STEPS}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='in {ROUTE_F_STALL} {ROUTE_F_KEEPER}, a flute player, and a girl with a drum are warming up the evening's songs, {ROUTE_F_GOOD} like warm honey over the whole square; the breeze keeps flipping the songbook pages and the drummer's little brass bells sit waiting for extra hands; {HERO} decides whether to hold the songbook pages open against the breeze or to try the little brass bells with the drummer girl'>>

choices.label: Hold the songbook pages against the breeze.
Try the little brass bells with the drummer.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='the drummer girl hands {HERO} the strap of little brass bells and shows him the trick, shake them soft on the drumbeat, like rain agreeing with thunder; beside the drum hangs a great shiny gong with a padded mallet that is very tempting; {HERO} decides whether to ring the bells softly in time with the drum or to give the big gong one mighty whack'>>

choices.label: Ring the bells softly in time.
Give the big gong one mighty whack.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=62 beats='shake, shake, on the beat, and the bells stitch a silver edge onto the drum song; {ROUTE_F_KEEPER} grins around his bow and the flute swoops happily; {COMPANION} taps her tail on the cobbles in perfect time, surprising herself; when the song lands, the whole corner applauds its two newest musicians'>>

choices.label: Take a bow with the band.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='{HERO} stands like a music stand with very good manners, holding the pages flat while the breeze tries every trick it knows; he learns to turn the page exactly on {ROUTE_F_KEEPER}'s nod; the songs pour out smooth with no flapping at all; between songs {ROUTE_F_KEEPER} leans down to ask {COMPANION} a question in a kind, quiet voice'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the band promises {COMPANION} they will play {GOAL}'s song the moment her lantern rises, and right there they teach {HERO} and {COMPANION} the humming part, low and warm like a kettle thinking; {COMPANION} hums it once, a tiny brave sound, then again a little stronger; the drummer girl declares {COMPANION} an official member of the band; {HERO} can head back to {HUB} or on toward {GOAL_STEPS}'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=95 beats='{GOAL_STEPS} glow under the thickest lantern strings, and the ceremony keepers are setting out the {GOAL} rack; on a long tray they lay spare {ITEM1}, coils of {ITEM2}, and little flames in tins, because no shy latecomer is ever left out at {THRESHOLD}; so whatever the evening has held, between {COMPANION}'s basket and the keeper's tray, everything {COMPANION}'s lantern needs is here; write this scene so it works no matter which stalls were visited or in what order; steam drifts up the steps, paper crinkles, string music floats over; helpers and stall keepers begin to gather; {COMPANION} takes a deep breath and looks to {HERO}, and three things could happen next, they could fold and write the wish, get {LANTERN} ready to fly, or gather the stall friends around {COMPANION} first'>>

choices.label: Help {COMPANION} fold and write her wish.
Gather the stall friends around {COMPANION} first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='{HERO} and {COMPANION} smooth {ITEM1} flat on the cool stone step, and a keeper lends them a thin brush and a pot of night-blue ink; all around, other families are folding their own wishes; {COMPANION} stares at the empty paper, wanting the wish to be exactly right, and shuffles a little closer to {HERO}'>>

choices.label: Lean in so {COMPANION} can whisper her wish.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='{COMPANION} cups her paws around {HERO}'s ear and whispers the wish, so quiet it is almost only warm air; it is a good one, simple and kind, the sort of wish that makes you smile with your whole face; {HERO} nods solemnly, keeper of the secret; now there is just the writing to decide'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the brush hovers over {ITEM1} and the night-blue ink shines; {HERO} and {COMPANION} decide how the wish should go down; he can write {COMPANION}'s wish exactly as she whispered it, or they can add a second line wishing something warm for all of {THRESHOLD} too, or {HERO} can hand {COMPANION} the brush so she writes it herself in her own wobbly letters; each way feels right in its own way'>>

choices.label: Write {COMPANION}'s wish just as she whispered it.
Add a second wish for all of {THRESHOLD}.
Hand {COMPANION} the brush to write it herself.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='{HERO} settles {LANTERN}'s little frame on his knees, its paper walls glowing faintly like a small moon waiting to happen; {COMPANION} crouches beside him, nose to nose with it; a keeper kneels to check the frame and pronounces it a fine flyer; there is string to tie and a flame to set before it can go anywhere'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='{ITEM2} goes on with a simple loop-loop-pull knot, easy enough for small paws, so the folded wish can hang beneath {LANTERN} like the clapper of a tiny bell; {COMPANION} pulls the last loop snug herself and checks it twice; {LANTERN} is dressed and ready; now only the flame is left, the biggest moment of all'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='a small flame waits in its tin, steady and warm, and {LANTERN}'s wick stands ready; the keepers say the lighting can be done any way the wisher likes best; {COMPANION} can touch the flame to the wick first, all by herself, or {HERO} and {COMPANION} can light it together on a count of three, or they can ask the oldest keeper to light it the old way with the long brass taper; {COMPANION} looks at each in turn'>>

choices.label: Let {COMPANION} light the wick all by herself.
Light it together on a count of three.
Ask the oldest keeper to light it the old way.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='{HERO} trots around {HUB} gathering company for {COMPANION}, and {THRESHOLD} answers the way it always does; every stall keeper who waved to them tonight comes over, and plenty of neighbors who simply love a ceremony come too, wiping hands on aprons, carrying cups and stools; write this so it rings true no matter which stalls were visited; a warm crowd gathers at the steps around one small {COMPANION_KIND}'>>

choices.label: Bring everyone into a circle around {COMPANION}.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the circle of lantern-lit faces settles on the steps, aprons and spectacles and one drum, all smiling at {COMPANION}; and {COMPANION}, who began the evening curled behind a barrel, stands in the very middle holding her lantern and does not hide at all; she shines like a little lantern herself; the launch is moments away'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='{LANTERN} glows in {COMPANION}'s paws, tugging gently upward like a puppy on a string, and the circle leans in; all that is left is choosing how to send it off; {COMPANION} can lead the count of three in her new brave voice, or the whole circle can count together like one big warm voice, or instead of counting everyone can hum {GOAL}'s song and let the music lift it; {HERO} squeezes {COMPANION}'s paw'>>

choices.label: Let {COMPANION} lead the count of three.
Hum {GOAL}'s song and let it lift.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=72 beats='three trays is two trays too many; the tower tips and {ROUTE_A_GOOD} bounce and roll everywhere like escaping ping-pong balls; nobody is hurt and {ROUTE_A_KEEPER} laughs loudest of all, but the big cleanup eats the rest of the evening, and {CHAPERONE} calls it a night; the keepers promise to save {COMPANION} a lantern for the very next market night, and {COMPANION} walks home between {HERO} and {CHAPERONE}, already planning; gentle and warm, a try-again, never sad'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=72 beats='the whole tray at once is a wobbly idea; the cups slide, the cozy-warm {ROUTE_C_GOOD} sloshes over {HERO}'s shoes, and half the cups need washing before anyone else can drink; no one is burned and {ROUTE_C_KEEPER} only chuckles, but by the time the washing is done {CHAPERONE} says it is home time; {ROUTE_C_KEEPER} sends them off with honey tea for the road and a promise of level-tray lessons next market night; {COMPANION} waves to {HUB} as they go, not one bit gloomy; gentle try-again'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=72 beats='{HERO} winds the beetle's key one turn too far and SPROING, the spring pops out and the beetle does one heroic backflip and lies still; {ROUTE_D_KEEPER} is not cross at all, springs pop every week, but the beetle needs a whole evening of careful surgery and the table becomes an operating room; {CHAPERONE} says that is their cue to head home; {ROUTE_D_KEEPER} promises the beetle will be marching by next market night and saves {COMPANION} a front-row stool for the next ceremony; a funny, gentle try-again'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=72 beats='the gong says BWOOONNNG so hugely that pigeons burst off every rooftop and the whole band stops mid-note; everyone laughs, even {ROUTE_F_KEEPER}, but ears are ringing and the band declares a long tea break to recover, and {CHAPERONE} decides that is the evening's big finish; the drummer girl tells {HERO} the gong gets everyone exactly once, and makes {COMPANION} promise to come hum with the band next market night; giggly, gentle try-again, no one upset'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=82 beats='{HERO} writes {COMPANION}'s wish in careful night-blue letters, exactly as whispered, not one word changed, and {COMPANION} watches every stroke; the folded wish is tied beneath {LANTERN}, the flame set, and up it sails over {THRESHOLD} with dozens of others, but theirs is easy to spot because it carries a secret only two friends know; the stall keepers cheer from the steps as {COMPANION} leans on {HERO}'s arm and watches her very own wish join the stars'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=82 beats='under {COMPANION}'s wish {HERO} adds one more line, a warm wish for all of {THRESHOLD}, for its steam and songs and kind hands, and {COMPANION} nods hard at every word; when {LANTERN} rises the stall keepers on the steps cheer as if they can feel the extra wish riding along; {LANTERN} climbs until it is a gold freckle among the stars, carrying kindness up for everyone who traded a little of it tonight'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=82 beats='{HERO} hands {COMPANION} the brush and {COMPANION}, who whispered all evening, writes her own wish in wobbly, proud letters while the keepers pretend not to peek; the wobbliest letters, the oldest keeper says, always fly the truest; when {LANTERN} lifts off with {COMPANION}'s own writing swinging beneath it, {COMPANION} discovers that her voice works out loud too, and she cheers, actually cheers, as her wish climbs the dark; the shy {COMPANION_KIND} from behind the barrel is gone for good'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=82 beats='{COMPANION} touches the little flame to the wick all by herself, steady as anything, and {LANTERN} wakes up glowing like a small tame moon; the crowd on the steps hushes, then cheers as it rises from her open paws; {COMPANION} stands tall watching her light climb over the rooftops, and {HERO} thinks she does not look like a shy {COMPANION_KIND} at all anymore, she looks like a lighthouse keeper; warm, proud, glowing finish'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=82 beats='one, two, three, and {HERO} and {COMPANION} touch the flame to the wick at the exact same moment, so {LANTERN} belongs to both of them forever; it rises trailing {ITEM2} over the steam and the music and the lantern strings, and all of {THRESHOLD} seems to glow a shade brighter as it goes; best market night ever, {COMPANION} says, out loud, in a voice that does not whisper at all; two friends, one light, one sky'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=82 beats='the oldest keeper lights the wick with the long brass taper, the way it was done when {THRESHOLD} was young, and tells them the taper has lit a thousand first wishes; a thousand and one now, says {COMPANION}, and the old keeper laughs like dry leaves; {LANTERN} rises slow and stately, and {HUB} watches the newest wish go up the oldest way, with {COMPANION} and {HERO} standing right at the heart of the tradition'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=82 beats='{COMPANION} lifts her chin and counts, one, two, THREE, in a clear little voice that surprises even the pigeons, and {LANTERN} leaps for the sky as if it had been waiting for exactly that voice; the circle of stall keepers roars and the band strikes up; {HERO} cheers loudest, because he heard where that voice began tonight, in a whisper behind a barrel, and look at it now, leading all of {HUB}'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=82 beats='the whole circle counts together, one, two, three, aprons and spectacles and drum and all, one big warm voice under the lantern strings, and {COMPANION}'s {LANTERN} sails up on the sound; it climbs past the rooftops with its wish swinging gently below, and the crowd keeps cheering long after; {COMPANION} spins slowly to look at every single face that counted for her, memorizing the best crowd a small {COMPANION_KIND} ever had'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=82 beats='nobody counts at all; instead the band begins {GOAL}'s song and the whole circle hums the low warm part, and on the swell of the music {COMPANION}'s {LANTERN} simply rises, as if the song itself were lifting it; it drifts up through the humming and the steam and the strings of little lights, glowing gold; {COMPANION} hums until {LANTERN} is a spark among the stars, and the music sends the wish the whole way up'>>
